steps.title: Spot the plural context
steps.content: The examples—Gwendolyn Brooks and Jayne Cortez—signal multiple writers and multiple works, requiring plural nouns in the blank.

steps.title: Distinguish plural from possessive
steps.content:
”Of other writers” is a prepositional phrase, not a possessive form. We need plain plurals—”works” and “writers”—and A, C, and D incorrectly use apostrophes where plain nouns are required.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
